#1A73E8.note: Buttons and links. If used as a chart series color, use color.dataviz.1 instead.

#5F6368.note: Used for both secondary text and borders. Map text usages to color.text.secondary, borders to color.border.default.

px-[18px].note: Off-scale spacing. 18px maps down to space.4 (16px) per the migration decision log.

fontSize: 13.note: 13px collapses into the 14px small body step.

#FFFFFF.note: Backgrounds map to color.surface.default; text on dark surfaces maps to color.text.inverse.
